intent: Add server-side validation for course enrollment dates so that enrollments cannot be created with an end date before the start date, per ISSUE-142.

validation_plan.reason: New model validation needs a failing-then-passing spec covering the date ordering rule
Full suite to catch regressions in enrollment-dependent flows

result_summary: Added a date-ordering validation to Enrollment with a clear error message, plus specs covering valid, inverted, and equal date cases. No schema change required; existing records unaffected.
